reason: Frontend guideline index — single-repo frontend task.

Favorite category contracts: bulk action short-circuit semantics (allInTarget), setTaskFavoriteCategory / clearTaskFavorite contracts, and the Common Mistakes section on bulk async + clearSelection ordering. New UX must not break these.
FavoriteCategoryMenu gets new props (includeClearFavorite / onClearFavorite); SelectionActionBar trigger toggling. Follow project component conventions.
New optional props on FavoriteCategoryMenu need safe TypeScript modeling — guard against passing onClearFavorite without includeClearFavorite or vice versa.
Reuse FavoriteCategoryMenu rather than forking the trigger / menu for already-favorited multi-select; extend via props.
